us.wa.wsdot.traffic.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{flow_data_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.traveltimes.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{travel_time_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.mountainpass.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{mountain_pass_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.weather.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{station_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.tolls.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{trip_name}`.

us.wa.wsdot.cvrestrictions.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{state_route_id}/{bridge_number}`.

us.wa.wsdot.border.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{crossing_name}`.

us.wa.wsdot.ferries.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{vessel_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.roadweather.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{station_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.alerts.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{alert_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.cameras.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{camera_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.bridgeclearances.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{crossing_location_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.ferryterminals.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for WSDOT CloudEvents on the `wsdot` topic keyed by `{terminal_id}`.

us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowStation.name: TrafficFlowStation
us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowStation.description: Metadata for a traffic flow sensor station in the Washington State DOT network. WSDOT deploys approximately 1,400 inductive loop sensors embedded in highway pavement across four geographic regions.

us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowReading.name: TrafficFlowReading
us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowReading.description: A traffic flow reading from a WSDOT sensor station. Updated approximately every 90 seconds, each reading reports the current Level of Service.

us.wa.wsdot.traffic.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.traveltimes.TravelTimeRoute.name: TravelTimeRoute
us.wa.wsdot.traveltimes.TravelTimeRoute.description: A named travel time route monitored by WSDOT. Each route has fixed start and end points on Washington State highways with historical average and current real-time travel times.

us.wa.wsdot.traveltimes.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.mountainpass.MountainPassCon.name: MountainPassCondition
us.wa.wsdot.mountainpass.MountainPassCon.description: Current conditions at a Washington State mountain pass including temperature, weather, road conditions, travel advisories, and directional restrictions.

us.wa.wsdot.mountainpass.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherStation.name: WeatherStation
us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherStation.description: Metadata for a WSDOT road weather information system (RWIS) station. WSDOT operates approximately 134 stations across Washington State highways.

us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherReading.name: WeatherReading
us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherReading.description: A current weather reading from a WSDOT road weather station including temperature, wind, precipitation, pressure, humidity, visibility, and sky coverage.

us.wa.wsdot.weather.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.tolls.TollRate.name: TollRate
us.wa.wsdot.tolls.TollRate.description: Current toll rate for a WSDOT tolled route segment. WSDOT operates dynamic tolling on SR 99, I-405, and SR 167.

us.wa.wsdot.tolls.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.cvrestrictions.CommercialVeh.name: CommercialVehicleRestriction
us.wa.wsdot.cvrestrictions.CommercialVeh.description: A commercial vehicle restriction on a Washington State highway bridge or road segment. Restrictions limit vehicle weight, height, length, or width.

us.wa.wsdot.cvrestrictions.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.border.BorderCrossing.name: BorderCrossing
us.wa.wsdot.border.BorderCrossing.description: Current wait time at a US-Canada border crossing lane in Washington State. Wait times are in minutes, updated approximately every 5 minutes.

us.wa.wsdot.border.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.ferries.VesselLocation.name: VesselLocation
us.wa.wsdot.ferries.VesselLocation.description: Real-time location and status of a Washington State Ferries vessel. WSF operates approximately 21 vessels across Puget Sound routes.

us.wa.wsdot.ferries.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.roadweather.RoadWeatherStati.name: RoadWeatherStation
us.wa.wsdot.roadweather.RoadWeatherStati.description: Metadata for a WSDOT Scanweb road weather information system (RWIS) station, including position and elevation. WSDOT operates roughly 105 Scanweb stations reporting pavement and atmospheric conditions across Washington State highways.

us.wa.wsdot.roadweather.RoadWeatherReadi.name: RoadWeatherReading
us.wa.wsdot.roadweather.RoadWeatherReadi.description: A current Scanweb road weather reading including air temperature, humidity, wind, visibility, precipitation totals, and per-sensor road surface and sub-surface measurements.

us.wa.wsdot.roadweather.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.alerts.HighwayAlert.name: HighwayAlert
us.wa.wsdot.alerts.HighwayAlert.description: An active WSDOT highway alert describing an incident, construction, closure, special event, or weather impact, with start and end roadway locations on the Washington State highway network.

us.wa.wsdot.alerts.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.cameras.HighwayCamera.name: HighwayCamera
us.wa.wsdot.cameras.HighwayCamera.description: Reference catalog entry for a WSDOT highway traffic camera, including its location and a claim-check image URL. The image bytes are not transported; consumers fetch the most recent frame from ImageURL on demand.

us.wa.wsdot.cameras.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.bridgeclearances.BridgeClear.name: BridgeClearance
us.wa.wsdot.bridgeclearances.BridgeClear.description: Reference catalog record of the surveyed vertical clearance of a structure crossing a Washington State highway, used for commercial vehicle routing. Largely static; refreshed periodically.

us.wa.wsdot.bridgeclearances.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

us.wa.wsdot.ferryterminals.TerminalSaili.name: TerminalSailingSpace
us.wa.wsdot.ferryterminals.TerminalSaili.description: Real-time drive-up and reservable vehicle space availability for upcoming Washington State Ferries departures from a terminal, broken down by sailing and arrival terminal.

us.wa.wsdot.ferryterminals.description: Events from WSDOT covering Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

TrafficFlowStation.name: TrafficFlowStation
TrafficFlowStation.description: Metadata for a traffic flow sensor station in the Washington State DOT network. WSDOT deploys approximately 1,400 inductive loop sensors embedded in highway pavement across four geographic regions.

flow_data_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this traffic flow sensor station, stringified from upstream FlowDataID.

station_name.description: Descriptive name of the flow sensor station.

description.description: Location description. Null if not provided.

road_name.description: Road designation where the sensor is installed.

direction.description: Direction of travel monitored. Examples: NB, SB, EB, WB.

TrafficFlowReading.name: TrafficFlowReading
TrafficFlowReading.description: A traffic flow reading from a WSDOT sensor station. Updated approximately every 90 seconds, each reading reports the current Level of Service.

flow_data_id.description: Sensor station identifier, stringified from upstream FlowDataID.

flow_reading.description: Current traffic Level of Service. Converted from upstream FlowReadingValue byte.

reading_time.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the reading.

TravelTimeRoute.name: TravelTimeRoute
TravelTimeRoute.description: A named travel time route monitored by WSDOT. Each route has fixed start and end points on Washington State highways with historical average and current real-time travel times.

travel_time_id.description: Unique route identifier, stringified from upstream TravelTimeID.

average_time.description: Historical average travel time in minutes.

current_time.description: Current real-time travel time in minutes.

time_updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last update.

MountainPassCondition.name: MountainPassCondition
MountainPassCondition.description: Current conditions at a Washington State mountain pass including temperature, weather, road conditions, travel advisories, and directional restrictions.

mountain_pass_id.description: Unique pass identifier, stringified from upstream MountainPassId.

elevation_in_feet.description: Summit elevation in feet above sea level.

temperature_in_fahrenheit.description: Temperature at the summit in Fahrenheit. Null if not reporting.

weather_condition.description: Current weather condition text. Examples: Clear, Rain, Snow, Fog.

road_condition.description: Road surface condition text. Examples: Dry, Wet, Compact Snow, Ice.

travel_advisory_active.description: True if a travel advisory is in effect.

date_updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last update.

WeatherStation.name: WeatherStation
WeatherStation.description: Metadata for a WSDOT road weather information system (RWIS) station. WSDOT operates approximately 134 stations across Washington State highways.

station_id.description: Station identifier from upstream StationID. The WeatherStation reference event is synthesized from the current-readings payload (the legacy WeatherStations endpoint was decommissioned), so this is the same numeric station identifier carried by WeatherReading.

station_name.description: Station name with highway and milepost.

WeatherReading.name: WeatherReading
WeatherReading.description: A current weather reading from a WSDOT road weather station including temperature, wind, precipitation, pressure, humidity, visibility, and sky coverage.

wind_direction.description: Wind direction in degrees from true north.

TollRate.name: TollRate
TollRate.description: Current toll rate for a WSDOT tolled route segment. WSDOT operates dynamic tolling on SR 99, I-405, and SR 167.

travel_direction.description: Travel direction: N, S, E, W.

CommercialVehicleRestriction.name: CommercialVehicleRestriction
CommercialVehicleRestriction.description: A commercial vehicle restriction on a Washington State highway bridge or road segment. Restrictions limit vehicle weight, height, length, or width.

state_route_id.description: State route identifier, first part of composite key.

bridge_number.description: Bridge or structure number, second part of composite key.

BorderCrossing.name: BorderCrossing
BorderCrossing.description: Current wait time at a US-Canada border crossing lane in Washington State. Wait times are in minutes, updated approximately every 5 minutes.

VesselLocation.name: VesselLocation
VesselLocation.description: Real-time location and status of a Washington State Ferries vessel. WSF operates approximately 21 vessels across Puget Sound routes.

vessel_id.description: Vessel identifier, stringified from upstream VesselID.

mmsi.description: Maritime Mobile Service Identity for AIS.

schema.name: TrafficFlowStation
schema.description: A reference record from Washington State Department of Transportation for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

schema.name: TrafficFlowReading
schema.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

schema.name: TravelTimeRoute
schema.description: A reference record from Washington State Department of Transportation for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

schema.name: MountainPassCondition
schema.description: A transport update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates for Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources.

schema.name: WeatherStation
schema.description: A reference record from Washington State Department of Transportation for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

schema.name: WeatherReading
schema.description: A transport update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates for Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources.

schema.name: TollRate
schema.description: A transport update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates for Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources.

schema.name: CommercialVehicleRestriction
schema.description: A vehicle or vessel update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It reports the latest position, movement, identity, or voyage information available from the upstream feed.

schema.name: BorderCrossing
schema.description: A transport update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates for Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources.

schema.name: VesselLocation
schema.description: A reference record from Washington State Department of Transportation for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

RoadWeatherStation.name: RoadWeatherStation
RoadWeatherStation.description: Metadata for a WSDOT Scanweb road weather information system (RWIS) station, including position and elevation. WSDOT operates roughly 105 Scanweb stations reporting pavement and atmospheric conditions across Washington State highways.

station_id.description: Stable station identifier. From upstream StationId; when StationId is blank (a few Scanweb stations report a blank id) the bridge copies the unique StationName into this field so every station has a stable, non-empty key.

station_name.description: Station name (unique across the Scanweb network).

RoadWeatherReading.name: RoadWeatherReading
RoadWeatherReading.description: A current Scanweb road weather reading including air temperature, humidity, wind, visibility, precipitation totals, and per-sensor road surface and sub-surface measurements.

station_id.description: Stable station identifier, matching the RoadWeatherStation key (StationId, or StationName when StationId is blank).

reading_time.description: Observation time as reported by Scanweb (ISO 8601, without timezone offset; interpreted as the station's local reporting clock).

relative_humidity.description: Relative humidity percentage. Upstream key is misspelled 'RelativeHumidty'.

average_wind_direction.description: Average wind direction in degrees from true north.

precipitation_intensity.description: Coded precipitation intensity as an opaque integer reported by the upstream Scanweb feed; WSDOT does not publish the code dictionary, so the value is passed through unmodified. Null when not reported.

precipitation_type.description: Coded precipitation type as an opaque integer reported by the upstream Scanweb feed (commonly none, rain, or snow); WSDOT does not publish the full code dictionary, so the value is passed through unmodified. Null when not reported.

precipitation_past_1_hour.description: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 1 hour.

precipitation_past_3_hours.description: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 3 hours.

precipitation_past_6_hours.description: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 6 hours.

precipitation_past_12_hours.description: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 12 hours.

precipitation_past_24_hours.description: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 24 hours.

precipitation_accumulation.description: Cumulative precipitation accumulation reported by the gauge, or null.

barometric_pressure.description: Barometric pressure, or null when the station has no pressure sensor.

snow_depth.description: Measured snow depth, or null when the station has no snow sensor.

items.name: SurfaceMeasurement
items.description: A single road surface sensor measurement at a Scanweb station.

sensor_id.description: Surface sensor identifier within the station.

road_freezing_temperature.description: Temperature at which the road surface is expected to freeze, accounting for residual de-icer.

road_surface_condition.description: Coded road surface condition as an opaque integer from the upstream Scanweb RoadSurfaceCondition enumeration (commonly dry, wet, snow, or ice); WSDOT does not publish the full code dictionary, so the value is passed through unmodified.

surface_measurements.description: Per-sensor road surface measurements (temperature, freezing point, surface condition).

items.name: SubSurfaceMeasurement
items.description: A single sub-surface (in-pavement) sensor measurement at a Scanweb station.

sensor_id.description: Sub-surface sensor identifier within the station.

HighwayAlert.name: HighwayAlert
HighwayAlert.description: An active WSDOT highway alert describing an incident, construction, closure, special event, or weather impact, with start and end roadway locations on the Washington State highway network.

alert_id.description: WSDOT alert identifier (stable for the life of the alert).

county.description: County in which the alert is located.

region.description: WSDOT region responsible for the alert.

priority.description: Alert priority (Highest, High, Medium, Low, Lowest).

event_category.description: Category of the event (e.g. Collision, Construction, Special Event, Weather).

event_status.description: Current status of the event (Open or Closed).

headline_description.description: Short human-readable headline for the alert.

extended_description.description: Longer human-readable description with full details.

start_time.description: Alert start time as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

end_time.description: Alert end time as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp, or null if open-ended.

last_updated_time.description: Time the alert was last updated, as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

start_description.description: Description of the start roadway location.

start_direction.description: Travel direction at the start location (e.g. B, N, S, E, W).

start_road_name.description: Road name/route designation at the start location.

start_latitude.description: Latitude of the start location in WGS84.

start_longitude.description: Longitude of the start location in WGS84.

end_description.description: Description of the end roadway location.

end_direction.description: Travel direction at the end location.

end_road_name.description: Road name/route designation at the end location.

end_latitude.description: Latitude of the end location in WGS84.

end_longitude.description: Longitude of the end location in WGS84.

HighwayCamera.name: HighwayCamera
HighwayCamera.description: Reference catalog entry for a WSDOT highway traffic camera, including its location and a claim-check image URL. The image bytes are not transported; consumers fetch the most recent frame from ImageURL on demand.

owner_url.description: URL with more information from the camera owner.

image_url.description: Claim-check URL of the current camera image. The image bytes are not transported in the event; consumers fetch the latest frame from this URL on demand.

is_active.description: Whether the camera is currently active.

region.description: WSDOT region (or area code) for the camera.

display_latitude.description: Latitude used for map display, in WGS84.

display_longitude.description: Longitude used for map display, in WGS84.

location_description.description: Description of the camera roadway location.

location_road_name.description: Road name/route designation at the camera location.

location_latitude.description: Latitude of the camera location in WGS84.

location_longitude.description: Longitude of the camera location in WGS84.

BridgeClearance.name: BridgeClearance
BridgeClearance.description: Reference catalog record of the surveyed vertical clearance of a structure crossing a Washington State highway, used for commercial vehicle routing. Largely static; refreshed periodically.

bridge_number.description: WSDOT bridge number of the structure.

state_route_id.description: State route identifier the structure crosses, or null.

inventory_direction.description: Inventory direction of the structure, or null.

srmp.description: State route milepost of the crossing.

srmp_ahead_back_indicator.description: Ahead/Back indicator disambiguating the milepost, or null.

vertical_clearance_maximum_feet_inch.description: Maximum vertical clearance as a feet-and-inches display string (e.g. '14 ft 3 in').

vertical_clearance_minimum_feet_inch.description: Minimum vertical clearance as a feet-and-inches display string.

control_entity_guid.description: GUID of the controlling entity record.

route_date.description: Effective route date as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

api_last_update.description: Time the clearance record was last updated upstream, as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

TerminalSailingSpace.name: TerminalSailingSpace
TerminalSailingSpace.description: Real-time drive-up and reservable vehicle space availability for upcoming Washington State Ferries departures from a terminal, broken down by sailing and arrival terminal.

items.name: DepartingSpace
items.description: Space availability for one upcoming departure from the terminal.

departure.description: Scheduled departure time as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

is_cancelled.description: Whether this departure has been cancelled.

vessel_id.description: Vessel identifier assigned to the departure.

vessel_name.description: Vessel name assigned to the departure.

max_space_count.description: Maximum vehicle space capacity of the vessel for this departure.

items.name: SpaceForArrivalTerminal
items.description: Vehicle space availability for one arrival terminal served by a sailing.

terminal_id.description: Departing terminal identifier for this space breakdown.

vessel_id.description: Vessel identifier assigned to the sailing.

vessel_name.description: Vessel name assigned to the sailing.

display_reservable_space.description: Whether reservable space should be displayed for this arrival terminal.

reservable_space_count.description: Number of reservable vehicle spaces remaining, or null when not displayed/available.

reservable_space_hex_color.description: Hex color code WSF uses to render reservable space availability.

display_drive_up_space.description: Whether drive-up space should be displayed for this arrival terminal.

drive_up_space_count.description: Number of drive-up vehicle spaces remaining, or null when not displayed/available.

drive_up_space_hex_color.description: Hex color code WSF uses to render drive-up space availability.

max_space_count.description: Maximum vehicle space capacity of the vessel for this sailing.

arrival_terminal_ids.description: Arrival terminal identifiers reachable on this sailing.

space_for_arrival_terminals.description: Per-arrival-terminal space breakdown for this departure.

departing_spaces.description: Upcoming departures from this terminal with per-sailing vehicle space availability.

is_no_fare_collected.description: Whether no fare is collected at this terminal for the relevant sailings, or null when not applicable.

no_fare_collected_msg.description: Message explaining the no-fare-collected status, or null.

schema.name: RoadWeatherStation
schema.doc: Metadata for a WSDOT Scanweb road weather information system (RWIS) station, including position and elevation. WSDOT operates roughly 105 Scanweb stations reporting pavement and atmospheric conditions across Washington State highways.

fields.name: station_id
fields.doc: Stable station identifier. From upstream StationId; when StationId is blank (a few Scanweb stations report a blank id) the bridge copies the unique StationName into this field so every station has a stable, non-empty key.

fields.name: station_name
fields.doc: Station name (unique across the Scanweb network).

fields.name: latitude
fields.doc: Latitude in WGS84.

fields.name: longitude
fields.doc: Longitude in WGS84.

fields.name: elevation
fields.doc: Station elevation above sea level.

schema.description: A reference record from Washington State Department of Transportation for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

schema.name: RoadWeatherReading
schema.doc: A current Scanweb road weather reading including air temperature, humidity, wind, visibility, precipitation totals, and per-sensor road surface and sub-surface measurements.

fields.name: station_id
fields.doc: Stable station identifier, matching the RoadWeatherStation key (StationId, or StationName when StationId is blank).

fields.name: station_name
fields.doc: Station name.

fields.name: latitude
fields.doc: Latitude in WGS84.

fields.name: longitude
fields.doc: Longitude in WGS84.

fields.name: elevation
fields.doc: Station elevation above sea level.

fields.name: reading_time
fields.doc: Observation time as reported by Scanweb (ISO 8601, without timezone offset; interpreted as the station's local reporting clock).

fields.name: air_temperature
fields.doc: Air temperature.

fields.name: relative_humidity
fields.doc: Relative humidity percentage. Upstream key is misspelled 'RelativeHumidty'.

fields.name: average_wind_speed
fields.doc: Average wind speed.

fields.name: average_wind_direction
fields.doc: Average wind direction in degrees from true north.

fields.name: wind_gust
fields.doc: Peak wind gust speed.

fields.name: visibility
fields.doc: Visibility distance.

fields.name: precipitation_intensity
fields.doc: Coded precipitation intensity as an opaque integer reported by the upstream Scanweb feed; WSDOT does not publish the code dictionary, so the value is passed through unmodified. Null when not reported.

fields.name: precipitation_type
fields.doc: Coded precipitation type as an opaque integer reported by the upstream Scanweb feed (commonly none, rain, or snow); WSDOT does not publish the full code dictionary, so the value is passed through unmodified. Null when not reported.

fields.name: precipitation_past_1_hour
fields.doc: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 1 hour.

fields.name: precipitation_past_3_hours
fields.doc: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 3 hours.

fields.name: precipitation_past_6_hours
fields.doc: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 6 hours.

fields.name: precipitation_past_12_hours
fields.doc: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 12 hours.

fields.name: precipitation_past_24_hours
fields.doc: Liquid-equivalent precipitation accumulated in the past 24 hours.

fields.name: precipitation_accumulation
fields.doc: Cumulative precipitation accumulation reported by the gauge, or null.

fields.name: barometric_pressure
fields.doc: Barometric pressure, or null when the station has no pressure sensor.

fields.name: snow_depth
fields.doc: Measured snow depth, or null when the station has no snow sensor.

fields.name: surface_measurements

items.name: SurfaceMeasurement
items.doc: A single road surface sensor measurement at a Scanweb station.

fields.name: sensor_id
fields.doc: Surface sensor identifier within the station.

fields.name: surface_temperature
fields.doc: Road surface temperature.

fields.name: road_freezing_temperature
fields.doc: Temperature at which the road surface is expected to freeze, accounting for residual de-icer.

fields.name: road_surface_condition
fields.doc: Coded road surface condition as an opaque integer from the upstream Scanweb RoadSurfaceCondition enumeration (commonly dry, wet, snow, or ice); WSDOT does not publish the full code dictionary, so the value is passed through unmodified.
Per-sensor road surface measurements (temperature, freezing point, surface condition).

fields.name: sub_surface_measurements

items.name: SubSurfaceMeasurement
items.doc: A single sub-surface (in-pavement) sensor measurement at a Scanweb station.

fields.name: sensor_id
fields.doc: Sub-surface sensor identifier within the station.

fields.name: sub_surface_temperature
fields.doc: Sub-surface (below pavement) temperature.
Per-sensor sub-surface (in-pavement) temperature measurements.

schema.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

schema.name: HighwayAlert
schema.doc: An active WSDOT highway alert describing an incident, construction, closure, special event, or weather impact, with start and end roadway locations on the Washington State highway network.

fields.name: alert_id
fields.doc: WSDOT alert identifier (stable for the life of the alert).

fields.name: county
fields.doc: County in which the alert is located.

fields.name: region
fields.doc: WSDOT region responsible for the alert.

fields.name: priority
fields.doc: Alert priority (Highest, High, Medium, Low, Lowest).

fields.name: event_category
fields.doc: Category of the event (e.g. Collision, Construction, Special Event, Weather).

fields.name: event_status
fields.doc: Current status of the event (Open or Closed).

fields.name: headline_description
fields.doc: Short human-readable headline for the alert.

fields.name: extended_description
fields.doc: Longer human-readable description with full details.

fields.name: start_time
fields.doc: Alert start time as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

fields.name: end_time
fields.doc: Alert end time as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp, or null if open-ended.

fields.name: last_updated_time
fields.doc: Time the alert was last updated, as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

fields.name: start_description
fields.doc: Description of the start roadway location.

fields.name: start_direction
fields.doc: Travel direction at the start location (e.g. B, N, S, E, W).

fields.name: start_road_name
fields.doc: Road name/route designation at the start location.

fields.name: start_milepost
fields.doc: Milepost of the start location.

fields.name: start_latitude
fields.doc: Latitude of the start location in WGS84.

fields.name: start_longitude
fields.doc: Longitude of the start location in WGS84.

fields.name: end_description
fields.doc: Description of the end roadway location.

fields.name: end_direction
fields.doc: Travel direction at the end location.

fields.name: end_road_name
fields.doc: Road name/route designation at the end location.

fields.name: end_milepost
fields.doc: Milepost of the end location.

fields.name: end_latitude
fields.doc: Latitude of the end location in WGS84.

fields.name: end_longitude
fields.doc: Longitude of the end location in WGS84.

schema.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

schema.name: HighwayCamera
schema.doc: Reference catalog entry for a WSDOT highway traffic camera, including its location and a claim-check image URL. The image bytes are not transported; consumers fetch the most recent frame from ImageURL on demand.

fields.name: camera_id
fields.doc: WSDOT camera identifier (stable).

fields.name: title
fields.doc: Human-readable camera title.

fields.name: description
fields.doc: Optional camera description.

fields.name: camera_owner
fields.doc: Organization that owns/operates the camera.

fields.name: owner_url
fields.doc: URL with more information from the camera owner.

fields.name: image_url
fields.doc: Claim-check URL of the current camera image. The image bytes are not transported in the event; consumers fetch the latest frame from this URL on demand.

fields.name: image_width
fields.doc: Width of the camera image.

fields.name: image_height
fields.doc: Height of the camera image.

fields.name: is_active
fields.doc: Whether the camera is currently active.

fields.name: region
fields.doc: WSDOT region (or area code) for the camera.

fields.name: sort_order
fields.doc: WSDOT display sort order.

fields.name: display_latitude
fields.doc: Latitude used for map display, in WGS84.

fields.name: display_longitude
fields.doc: Longitude used for map display, in WGS84.

fields.name: location_description
fields.doc: Description of the camera roadway location.

fields.name: location_direction
fields.doc: Travel direction the camera faces.

fields.name: location_road_name
fields.doc: Road name/route designation at the camera location.

fields.name: location_milepost
fields.doc: Milepost of the camera location.

fields.name: location_latitude
fields.doc: Latitude of the camera location in WGS84.

fields.name: location_longitude
fields.doc: Longitude of the camera location in WGS84.

schema.description: A reference record from Washington State Department of Transportation for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

schema.name: BridgeClearance
schema.doc: Reference catalog record of the surveyed vertical clearance of a structure crossing a Washington State highway, used for commercial vehicle routing. Largely static; refreshed periodically.

fields.name: crossing_location_id
fields.doc: Stable crossing location identifier (CrossingLocationId).

fields.name: bridge_number
fields.doc: WSDOT bridge number of the structure.

fields.name: state_route_id
fields.doc: State route identifier the structure crosses, or null.

fields.name: state_structure_id
fields.doc: Statewide structure identifier.

fields.name: crossing_description
fields.doc: Human-readable description of the crossing.

fields.name: inventory_direction
fields.doc: Inventory direction of the structure, or null.

fields.name: srmp
fields.doc: State route milepost of the crossing.

fields.name: srmp_ahead_back_indicator
fields.doc: Ahead/Back indicator disambiguating the milepost, or null.

fields.name: latitude
fields.doc: Latitude in WGS84.

fields.name: longitude
fields.doc: Longitude in WGS84.

fields.name: vertical_clearance_maximum_inches
fields.doc: Maximum vertical clearance, in inches.

fields.name: vertical_clearance_maximum_feet_inch
fields.doc: Maximum vertical clearance as a feet-and-inches display string (e.g. '14 ft 3 in').

fields.name: vertical_clearance_minimum_inches
fields.doc: Minimum vertical clearance, in inches.

fields.name: vertical_clearance_minimum_feet_inch
fields.doc: Minimum vertical clearance as a feet-and-inches display string.

fields.name: control_entity_guid
fields.doc: GUID of the controlling entity record.

fields.name: crossing_record_guid
fields.doc: GUID of the crossing record.

fields.name: location_guid
fields.doc: GUID of the location record.

fields.name: route_date
fields.doc: Effective route date as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

fields.name: api_last_update
fields.doc: Time the clearance record was last updated upstream, as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

schema.description: A reference record from Washington State Department of Transportation for a station, stop, route, site, or other transport resource. It gives consumers stable identifiers and labels needed to interpret realtime updates.

schema.name: TerminalSailingSpace
schema.doc: Real-time drive-up and reservable vehicle space availability for upcoming Washington State Ferries departures from a terminal, broken down by sailing and arrival terminal.

fields.name: terminal_id
fields.doc: Washington State Ferries terminal identifier (stable).

fields.name: terminal_subject_id
fields.doc: WSF terminal subject identifier.

fields.name: region_id
fields.doc: WSF region identifier.

fields.name: terminal_name
fields.doc: Terminal name.

fields.name: terminal_abbrev
fields.doc: Terminal abbreviation code.

fields.name: sort_seq
fields.doc: WSF display sort sequence.

fields.name: departing_spaces

items.name: DepartingSpace
items.doc: Space availability for one upcoming departure from the terminal.

fields.name: departure
fields.doc: Scheduled departure time as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.

fields.name: is_cancelled
fields.doc: Whether this departure has been cancelled.

fields.name: vessel_id
fields.doc: Vessel identifier assigned to the departure.

fields.name: vessel_name
fields.doc: Vessel name assigned to the departure.

fields.name: max_space_count
fields.doc: Maximum vehicle space capacity of the vessel for this departure.

fields.name: space_for_arrival_terminals

items.name: SpaceForArrivalTerminal
items.doc: Vehicle space availability for one arrival terminal served by a sailing.

fields.name: terminal_id
fields.doc: Departing terminal identifier for this space breakdown.

fields.name: terminal_name
fields.doc: Human-readable sailing path (departing -> arrival terminals).

fields.name: vessel_id
fields.doc: Vessel identifier assigned to the sailing.

fields.name: vessel_name
fields.doc: Vessel name assigned to the sailing.

fields.name: display_reservable_space
fields.doc: Whether reservable space should be displayed for this arrival terminal.

fields.name: reservable_space_count
fields.doc: Number of reservable vehicle spaces remaining, or null when not displayed/available.

fields.name: reservable_space_hex_color
fields.doc: Hex color code WSF uses to render reservable space availability.

fields.name: display_drive_up_space
fields.doc: Whether drive-up space should be displayed for this arrival terminal.

fields.name: drive_up_space_count
fields.doc: Number of drive-up vehicle spaces remaining, or null when not displayed/available.

fields.name: drive_up_space_hex_color
fields.doc: Hex color code WSF uses to render drive-up space availability.

fields.name: max_space_count
fields.doc: Maximum vehicle space capacity of the vessel for this sailing.

fields.name: arrival_terminal_ids
fields.doc: Arrival terminal identifiers reachable on this sailing.
Per-arrival-terminal space breakdown for this departure.
Upcoming departures from this terminal with per-sailing vehicle space availability.

fields.name: is_no_fare_collected
fields.doc: Whether no fare is collected at this terminal for the relevant sailings, or null when not applicable.

fields.name: no_fare_collected_msg
fields.doc: Message explaining the no-fare-collected status, or null.

schema.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Washington State Department of Transportation. It carries traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

description: WSDOT publishes traffic, travel, bridge, toll, pass, ferry, and border-wait updates from Washington State Department of Transportation for Washington road, bridge, pass, ferry, and border resources. These events help consumers monitor mobility operations, passenger information, and traffic conditions without polling the upstream source directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for WSDOT, including upstream feed context and bridge deployment notes.
